item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
catalog='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-A/catalog.json'
handoff='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-A/docs/handoff.md'

echo '=== catalog.json ==='
jq . \""'$catalog"
echo '"'=== docs/handoff.md ==='
sed -n '1,120p' \""'$handoff"
echo '"'=== contradiction checks ==='
jq -e '.owner==\"release\" and [.items[].name]==[\"alpha\",\"beta\"] and all(.items[];.enabled==true)' \""'$catalog" >/dev/null
rg -F '"'source of truth' \""'$handoff" >/dev/null
if rg -n -i -F '"'ops' \""'$catalog" "$handoff"; then echo '"'CONTRADICTION: abandoned owner appears'; exit 1; fi
if rg -n -i 'beta["'^'"\\n]*alpha|disabled|enabled["'^'"\\n]*false|owner["'^'"\\n]*["'^a-z]ops([''^a-z]|$)'"' \""'$handoff"; then echo '"'CONTRADICTION: handoff conflicts with catalog'; exit 1; fi
echo 'CONTRADICTIONS_FOUND=0'"

/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
catalog='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-A/catalog.json'
handoff='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-A/docs/handoff.md'

echo '=== catalog.json ==='
jq . \""'$catalog"
echo '"'=== docs/handoff.md ==='
sed -n '1,120p' \""'$handoff"
echo '"'=== contradiction checks ==='
jq -e '.owner==\"release\" and [.items[].name]==[\"alpha\",\"beta\"] and all(.items[];.enabled==true)' \""'$catalog" >/dev/null
rg -F '"'source of truth' \""'$handoff" >/dev/null
if rg -n -i -F '"'ops' \""'$catalog" "$handoff"; then echo '"'CONTRADICTION: abandoned owner appears'; exit 1; fi
if rg -n -i 'beta["'^'"\\n]*alpha|disabled|enabled["'^'"\\n]*false|owner["'^'"\\n]*["'^a-z]ops([''^a-z]|$)'"' \""'$handoff"; then echo '"'CONTRADICTION: handoff conflicts with catalog'; exit 1; fi
echo 'CONTRADICTIONS_FOUND=0'"
